task_completion.description: Document the radiation exposure diagnosis (ICD-10 W90 or Z57.1) as an active condition for Matt Zenon.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A GNU Health screen showing the patient 'Matt Zenon' with an active condition or diagnosis code 'W90' or 'Z57.1' (or text indicating radiation exposure).

task_completion.description: Record a clinical evaluation documenting an elevated heart rate (>= 80 bpm).
task_completion.visual_evidence: A clinical evaluation or vitals screen for Matt Zenon showing a heart rate (or pulse) value of 80 or greater.

task_completion.description: Order at least two baseline laboratory studies, including a CBC and a metabolic panel.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A lab test request or orders screen showing at least two tests ordered for Matt Zenon, specifically including a CBC (Complete Blood Count) and a metabolic panel.

task_completion.description: Prescribe a prophylactic antiemetic (Ondansetron, Metoclopramide, or Promethazine).
task_completion.visual_evidence: A prescription or medication screen showing 'Ondansetron', 'Metoclopramide', or 'Promethazine' prescribed for Matt Zenon.

task_completion.description: Schedule a follow-up appointment between 2 and 7 days from today.
task_completion.visual_evidence: An appointment scheduling screen or calendar view showing an appointment created for Matt Zenon with a date that is 2 to 7 days after the current system date.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the GNU Health graphical user interface.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the GNU Health desktop client being used, rather than terminal commands or API scripts.

integrity.description: The agent modified the actual patient record rather than typing answers into a text editor.
integrity.visual_evidence: Data entry is visible within the appropriate GNU Health form fields (e.g., patient chart, evaluations, prescriptions) and not in a separate text document.

integrity.description: The agent did not use direct database manipulation to insert records.
integrity.visual_evidence: Absence of terminal windows showing PostgreSQL commands or Python scripts used to bypass the GNU Health UI.
